nasb.text: The Lord was with Joseph, so he became a successful man. And he was in the house of his master, the Egyptian.

esv.text: The Lord was with Joseph, and he became a successful man, and he was in the house of his Egyptian master.

cnv.text: 耶和華與約瑟同在，約瑟就事事順利，住在他主人埃及人的家裡。

ccb.text: 约瑟住在他的埃及主人家中，耶和华与他同在，使他凡事亨通。

csbs.text: 耶和华与约瑟同在，他就成为事事顺利的人。他住在他埃及主人的家中。
